title: limonia elephantum
intro: Limonia elephantum, also known as the wild lime or Malabar limetta, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family, characterized by its citrus-like leaves and fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Limonia elephantum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. The health benefits of the plant include its antioxidant properties, which help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which aid in the prevention of infections. Limonia elephantum can be prepared as a herbal remedy by making a decoction from its leaves and branches, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application for skin issues.
